steps.title: Apply the factoring from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: Divide by $3$: $x-9 = 8$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Dividing each side of the given equation by $3$ yields $x-9=8$. Therefore, the value of $x-9$ is $8$.

steps.title: Check the choices
